name: progression-guidance
note: S-PROG-GUIDANCE (operator UAT 2026-07-17: 'I could use that level of guidance when choosing standard progressions' + 'needs more progressions' + issue #264 rename + the blank-section-dropdown bug on a re-opened plain progression). Three asserts groups, all red-first: (1) the Song-canvas template chooser reveals a FEEL/WHEN/PROVEN guidance ladder behind a per-suggestion '?' (absent pre-fix), and the section switcher includes Pre-Chorus (absent pre-fix); (2) the Chords-mode suggest row leads with 'Suggested' (#264 - pre-fix said 'Add a 2nd chord:'); (3) a LEGACY custom saved with the off-vocabulary 'Progression' sheet label re-enters the builder as a standard 'Verse' section with a NON-BLANK section dropdown (pre-fix: card read 'Progression', select rendered blank).

steps.label: the section switcher includes Pre-Chorus AND Solo (operator sections 2026-07-17)
every template suggestion renders as a row with a '?' guidance reveal (absent pre-fix)
the guidance ladder opens with FEEL and WHEN labeled rows carrying real prose (the Studio-guidance bar)
steps.js: (function(){var p=document.querySelector('.ssWhyPanel');if(!p)return false;var lbls=Array.prototype.map.call(p.querySelectorAll('.ssWhyLbl'),function(l){return l.textContent.trim().toLowerCase();});var txts=Array.prototype.map.call(p.querySelectorAll('.ssWhyTxt'),function(t){return t.textContent.trim();});return lbls.indexOf('feel')>=0 && lbls.indexOf('when')>=0 && txts.every(function(t){return t.length>10;});})()

steps.label: the open '?' is marked (aria-expanded) and tapping is one-at-a-time revealable
#264: the suggest row leads with 'Suggested' (pre-fix: 'Add a 2nd chord:')
seed a LEGACY plain-progression custom with the old 'Progression' sheet label
steps.js: (function(){try{localStorage.setItem('roadcase-ukulele-gcea.custom.v1', JSON.stringify([{id:'legacyProg1', t:'Legacy Prog', a:'Me', y:2026, d:'Mine', custom:true, seq:['C','G'], sheet:[['Progression','[C] [G]']]}]));return true}catch(e){return false}})()

steps.label: the legacy 'Progression' section re-enters the canvas as a STANDARD Verse card (pre-fix: card read 'Progression')
editing it points the section dropdown at Verse - NEVER a blank select (the reported bug)
